name: @tenantkit/testing
description: The in-memory adapter + port conformance suite for the tenantkit kernel — the 'is it really decoupled?' honesty check (docs/14 §6.4). Vendor-free CoreRuntime for fast tests + reusable vitest suites every adapter must pass.
_note: Realizes docs/14-portability-and-providers.md §6.4 (conformance suite = honesty check) and §7 (in-memory adapter, rollout order #2). No vendor SDK imports anywhere — that is the whole point: the kernel runs against this with zero Supabase/Resend/Stripe. The Supabase adapter runs the SAME conformance suites against a throwaway Supabase project in an integration lane (docs/14 §8 test-matrix note).
